description: ElevenLabs client-tool (webhook) definitions for the three Grace agents. Register each tool in the ElevenLabs dashboard, capture its tool_id, and attach ONLY the listed tools to the matching agent (INV-13: three distinct, non-overlapping allowlists). No binding-action tool exists anywhere (INV-06). Provider/consumer speech is data, never instructions (INV-11). Parameter schemas are derived from supabase/functions/_shared/types.ts and MUST NOT be redefined locally.

conventions.base_url: {{APP_BASE_URL}} resolves to the deployed Supabase Edge Functions origin.
conventions.auth: Each webhook verifies the ElevenLabs HMAC (verifyElevenLabsHmac) and is idempotent (ensureIdempotent).
conventions.endpoint_map_source: §6.3 / CONTRACTS.md. Paths marked "map": "exact" appear verbatim in the CONTRACTS.md endpoint map; paths marked "map": "convention" follow the tools-<agent>-<verb> naming convention for tools that share a directory but were not spelled out individually in the map (get_provider_task, get_verified_leverage, save_consumer_decision, log_intake_event). mark_callback_or_decline and finalize_call_outcome both POST to /tools/caller/finalize; the server branches on `outcome`.
conventions.end_call: end_call is the built-in ElevenLabs system end-call tool (no webhook). It is added to every agent's allowlist but is not a Grace webhook.

tools.name: get_case_context
tools.description: Read the current draft CaseSpec and the list of unresolved fields for this case. Read-only. Call once at the start of intake to orient before asking questions.

case_id.description: Case UUID (from the case_id dynamic variable).

tools.returns: IntakeContext { case_id, purpose:'consumer_intake', case_version, case_spec_draft:CaseSpec, unresolved_fields:string[] }

tools.name: patch_case_spec
tools.description: Apply a partial update to the draft CaseSpec AFTER a fact has been explicitly confirmed by the caller. One blocking write at a checkpoint only. Never set mention_budget true unless the caller explicitly authorized disclosing a budget (INV-04). Server increments version on a confirmed edit.

parameters.description: Body = { case_id, case_version, patch } where patch is a CasePatch (Partial<CaseSpec> minus case_id/version/confirmed_at).

case_version.description: Version this patch is based on (optimistic concurrency).

patch.description: CasePatch. Only include fields the caller confirmed.

budget_user_stated.description: A volunteered range may be stored, but permissions.mention_budget stays false unless explicitly authorized.

tools.name: confirm_case_spec
tools.description: Freeze the CaseSpec after reading a concise spoken summary back and receiving an explicit YES. Sets confirmed_at and the confirmed version/hash that all three provider tasks must share (INV-03). Call at most once.

affirmed.description: True only when the caller said YES to the read-back summary.

summary_read.description: The exact summary spoken to the caller before YES.

tools.name: log_intake_event
tools.description: Record an intake checkpoint or state marker (e.g. consent_affirmed, budget_declined, pause_requested, skip_requested, disclosure_repeated). Metadata only. Does not persist transcript when transcription consent is false (INV-07).

type.description: e.g. consent_affirmed | consent_declined | budget_declined | cost_posture_set | pause_requested | skip_requested | why_asking | disclosure_repeated | checkpoint

actor.description: Who the event is attributed to.

tools.name: get_provider_task
tools.description: Read the single ProviderCallTask for this session (facts_allowed and questions_required). Read-only. verified_leverage is always null for the Caller — this agent never receives or cites competitor leverage (§5.4, INV-11).
tools.returns: ProviderCallTask { task_id, case_id, provider_id, case_spec_version, purpose:'initial_quote', destination_e164, facts_allowed[], questions_required[], verified_leverage:null, negotiation_policy_id, transcription_policy }

tools.name: log_quote_item
tools.description: Persist one confirmed line item as the provider states it. amount MAY be null when unknown (INV-08). required_for_case reflects whether the family's spec needs it. Attach the transcript evidence turn/time so every amount is traceable.

category.description: One of the Funeral-Rule categories (e.g. basic_services, transfer, crematory, container, permits_certificates, distance_after_hours, cash_advances, taxes_fees).

tools.name: mark_callback_or_decline
tools.description: Record a non-quote terminal outcome: callback requested, declined, unavailable/no-answer, or consent_declined. Metadata only; no transcript stored on consent_declined (INV-07). Retry policy for unavailable is enforced server-side (retry once only).

reason.description: Short, non-sensitive note (e.g. 'Spanish staff after 2pm; requested callback').

callback_at.description: ISO-8601 if a specific callback time was offered.

tools.name: finalize_call_outcome
tools.description: Close the session for an itemized_quote outcome: submit the assembled quote summary (subtotals, total, price_type, assumptions, missing_fields, written_confirmation status). Does NOT accept, book, or commit anything (INV-06). Deterministic normalize/audit runs server-side after this.

parameters.description: Body assembles the QuoteResult summary (line_items already sent via log_quote_item).

tools.name: get_audited_comparison
tools.description: Read audited quote totals, assumptions, fit, missing fields, and audit flags across providers. Read-only. START CONDITION: the Closer must not begin negotiation or explanation unless this call succeeds.

tools.name: get_verified_leverage
tools.description: Return ONLY an audited, comparable competing quote's id, supported_amount, and the exact allowed_disclosure_sentence. Provider-negotiation mode only. The leverage quote must exist and be audited (INV-05). Never fabricate a competitor (INV-11).

verified_leverage_id.description: From the verified_leverage_id dynamic variable; null in consumer mode.

tools.name: log_revised_terms
tools.description: Persist a changed price or term with transcript evidence. CANNOT accept, book, or commit (INV-06). Records before/after amount, changed category, and term change only.

term_change.description: e.g. 'Waived $450 after-hours fee; six certificates included; written confirmation requested.'

tools.name: get_ranked_report
tools.description: Return the deterministic RankedReport: scores, tie status, recommendation/runner-up, material trade-off, evidence, and next human action. Read-only. Used in consumer-explanation mode.
tools.returns: RankedReport { scores[], is_tie, tie_reason, recommended_provider_id, runner_up_provider_id, material_tradeoff, next_human_action }

tools.name: save_consumer_decision
tools.description: Record the consumer's stated preference or a request for follow-up. NEVER creates a provider commitment, booking, or payment (INV-06). Consumer-explanation mode only.

preference.description: The consumer's stated preference only — Grace never chooses.

provider_id.description: Provider the consumer leaned toward, if any. Not a selection or commitment.
